title: Claude Opus 4.7
author: meetpateltech
aiHeadline: Claude Opus 4.7: Because the world needed another AI model, and here it is, ready to solve all your problems... or just create new ones.

title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
author: cmitsakis
aiHeadline: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Now everyone can be a coding genius, because clearly, the world wasn't saturated with enough AI-powered coders already.

title: Codex for almost everything
author: mikeevans
aiHeadline: Codex for almost everything: Because why have one tool when you can have one tool that tries to do everything, even if it's not great at most of them?

title: The local LLM ecosystem doesn’t need Ollama
author: Zetaphor
aiHeadline: The local LLM ecosystem doesn’t need Ollama: Because there's nothing more the AI space needs than another acronym to memorize.

title: The future of everything is lies, I guess: Where do we go from here?
author: aphyr
aiHeadline: The future of everything is lies: Welcome to the dystopian nightmare where even the truth is up for grabs, and we're all just along for the ride.
